import { useState } from 'react'; import Navbar from "../components/Navbar"; import { useTheme } from '../contexts/ThemeContext'; export default function Dashboard({ user, setUser }) { const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState(''); const { theme } = useTheme(); const stats = [ { label: 'Total Papers', value: '247', change: '+12%', color: 'from-primary' }, { label: 'AI Insights', value: '1.2K', change: '+8%', color: 'from-secondary' }, { label: 'Recommendations', value: '89', change: '+5%', color: 'from-primary' }, { label: 'Summaries', value: '156', change: '+23%', color: 'from-secondary' }, ]; const quickActions = [ { icon: '📄', label: 'New Summary', href: '/upload' }, { icon: '💡', label: 'Recommendations', href: '/recommend' }, { icon: '🔍', label: 'Search Papers', href: '/search' }, { icon: '📊', label: 'Analytics', href: '/analytics' }, ]; const recentActivity = [ { title: 'AI Paper Analysis', time: '2 min ago', type: 'summary' }, { title: 'New Recommendation', time: '1 hr ago', type: 'recommend' }, { title: 'Paper Upload', time: '3 hrs ago', type: 'upload' }, { title: 'Domain Research', time: '1 day ago', type: 'research' }, ]; return (
{/* Search Bar */}
setSearchQuery(e.target.value)} className="input-glass w-full font-premium text-lg pl-12 pr-12 py-6 bg-transparent focus:ring-0" />
{/* Stats Cards */}
{stats.map((stat, index) => (
{stat.label}
{stat.value}
{stat.change}
))}
{/* Quick Actions */}

Quick Actions

{quickActions.map((action, index) => (
{action.icon}
{action.label}
 ))}
{/* Recent Activity */}

Recent Activity

{recentActivity.map((activity, index) => (

{activity.title}

{activity.time}

))}
); }
